zh.lifeSummary: 當Erard of Bar於1262年出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，他的父親Thiébaut II de Bar41歲，母親Jeanne de Toucy31歲。他和Isabella Of Lorraine至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1335年在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯皮朋特享年73歲。

nameMeanings.name: Erard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Erard of Bar was born in 1262, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Thiébaut II de Bar, was 41 and his mother, Jeanne de Toucy, was 31. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Isabella Of Lorraine. He died in 1335, in Pierrepont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Erard of Bar est né en 1262, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Thiébaut II de Bar, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Toucy, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Isabella Of Lorraine. Il est décédé en 1335, à Pierrepont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Erard of Bar 1262 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thiébaut II de Bar 41 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Toucy 31. Er hatte mit Isabella Of Lorraine mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1335 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Pierrepont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Erard of Bar è nato il nel 1262 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Thiébaut II de Bar, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Toucy, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Isabella Of Lorraine. Morì nel 1335, nel Pierrepont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Erard of Barが1262年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Thiébaut II de Barは41歳，母Jeanne de Toucyは31歳であった。彼はIsabella Of Lorraineとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1335年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンピエレプオントで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Erard of Bar(이)가 1262년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thiébaut II de Bar(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Toucy(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Isabella Of Lorraine(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1335년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 피레폰트에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Erard of Bar nasceu em 1262, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Thiébaut II de Bar, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Toucy, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Isabella Of Lorraine. Ele faleceu em 1335, em Pierrepont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Erard of Bar родился в 1262 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Thiébaut II de Bar было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Toucy, 31. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Isabella Of Lorraine. Он умер в 1335 г. в местности пьиррепонт, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Erard of Bar nació en 1262, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Thiébaut II de Bar, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Toucy, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Isabella Of Lorraine. Murió en 1335, en Pierrepont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 73 años.
